name: Viennese Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly over the bottom of an 8 x 8 inch baking dish.
2. Pat sausage meat on waxed paper to fit the dish. Invert it onto the crumbs and remove the paper. Cover.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 minutes.
4. Drain as much fat as possible without disturbing the meat.
5. While the meat is cooking, melt butter in a medium saucepan.
6. Add curry powder, salt, pepper, chopped onion, and grated cheese to the melted butter. Stir until the cheese is melted.
7. Stir in flour, then add milk and beaten egg. Stir vigorously until thickened. It will be thick.
8. Remove from heat and carefully place the sausage meat back into the oven.
9. Spread the mixture evenly over the meat. Leave uncovered.
10. Return to the oven and bake at 400°F for an additional 30 minutes until golden brown.
11. Serves 3-4. The recipe can be doubled and baked in a 9 x 13 inch pan.
